description: QuantNeon UI/UX polish: Add framer-motion dependency, wire all components through API hooks with proper loading/error/empty states, add spring-physics animations (StaggerList, PageTransition, SpringButton from @quant/shared-ui), staggered list entrances, responsive dark-mode styles with Tailwind (360px-1440px), 44px tap targets, and hover/press/focus states across all pages and components.
steps: Add framer-motion ^11.0.0 to apps/quantneon/package.json dependencies and run pnpm install at the workspace root.
Update apps/quantneon/tailwind.config.ts to extend theme with dark mode ('class' strategy), custom neon/purple accent colors, and responsive breakpoints. Add the dark class support.
Update apps/quantneon/src/pages/globals.css to add dark mode CSS custom properties (--quant-* vars matching the pattern in quantsync), smooth scroll behavior, and base responsive utility styles.
Update apps/quantneon/src/pages/_app.tsx to wrap with MotionProvider (from @quant/shared-ui) and add page transition animations. Import AnimatePresence from framer-motion for page transitions.

Update apps/quantneon/src/pages/index.tsx (Feed page): Replace raw HTML with proper Tailwind dark-mode classes, wrap posts list in StaggerList for staggered entrance, add PullToRefresh wrapper, use SpringButton for like/save actions with haptic-style scale animations, add proper loading skeleton (multiple Skeleton cards), and ensure 44px min tap targets on all buttons. Make responsive from 360px to 1440px.

Update apps/quantneon/src/components/StoryRing.tsx: Add motion.div scale animation on tap (whileTap scale 0.92), smooth gradient ring animation, 44px+ tap target, dark mode text colors, and responsive sizing.

Update apps/quantneon/src/components/PostGrid.tsx: Add staggered fade-in animation on grid items using motion.div, responsive grid (2 cols on mobile 360px, 3 cols on tablet+), hover scale with ScaleOnHover, blurhash placeholder pattern (use bg-gradient as placeholder while loading), dark mode overlay/text colors.

Update apps/quantneon/src/pages/explore.tsx: Add PageTransition wrapper, proper search input with focus ring and 44px height, skeleton grid loader, empty state with illustration, responsive layout, dark mode classes.

Update apps/quantneon/src/pages/reels.tsx: Add smooth slide transitions between reels (AnimatePresence + motion.div with Y slide), spring-physics like button animation, progress bar animation, responsive full-height layout, dark mode, 44px action button targets.
Update apps/quantneon/src/components/ShoppingCard.tsx: Add FadeIn animation, proper image placeholder, 44px 'Add to Cart' button, hover elevation, dark mode card styling, responsive width.
Update apps/quantneon/src/components/ReelPlayer.tsx: Add motion animations for play/pause overlay, smooth progress bar, responsive aspect ratio, dark overlay styling.
Update apps/quantneon/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx: Enhance with FadeIn animation, dark mode support, responsive padding, and branded styling with proper focus states on the retry button.

Update apps/quantneon/src/pages/shop.tsx and apps/quantneon/src/pages/shopping.tsx: Add PageTransition, product grid with StaggerList, proper loading skeletons for product cards, empty state for no products, responsive grid layout, dark mode.

Ensure all remaining pages (broadcast.tsx, camera.tsx, close-friends.tsx, collab.tsx, create.tsx, games.tsx, guides.tsx, highlights.tsx, messages.tsx, notes.tsx, stories.tsx) have at minimum: PageTransition wrapper, dark mode classes, responsive containers, and proper loading/error states if they fetch data.
acceptance_criteria: framer-motion is in quantneon's package.json dependencies
All pages wrap content in PageTransition for entrance animation
Feed page uses StaggerList for post list entrance animation
All interactive buttons have min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or equivalent tap targets
All components have dark mode classes (dark:bg-*, dark:text-*)
Responsive: pages render properly from 360px to 1440px (use responsive Tailwind breakpoints sm/md/lg/xl)
Loading states show skeleton loaders (not just spinners)
Error states use ErrorState component with retry callback
Empty states have friendly copy and illustrations
findings: Pre-existing typecheck errors in packages/observability (opentelemetry version mismatch) and packages/server-core (@quant/database module not found) are NOT caused by our changes. Confirmed by running typecheck on base commit. Skeleton component uses variant values 'text'|'circle'|'rect' with string width/height. The lint-staged pre-commit hook runs prettier --write on staged files.
